YoYo Pilas Runner upstream references
=========================================

YoYo Loader Vita
Repository: https://github.com/Rinnegatamante/yoyoloader_vita
Role: UI and workflow inspiration: one library, simple game selector, per-game folders.

gmloader-next
Repository: https://github.com/JohnnyonFlame/gmloader-next
Bundled commit: c2fca354df73761887c15f44a0b28ec823581cd5
Role: GameMaker Android compatibility and execution layer.
License: GPL-2.0. See vendor/gmloader-next/LICENSE.md.

gmloadernext.squashfs runtime
Repository: https://github.com/JeodC/RHH-Ports
File: runtimes/gmloadernext.squashfs
Runtime SHA256: 241E5C299C9DD7195D0857D036FDA0C924485084C5ED39A0BB60F3C95CDA3837
Extracted binary: pilasrunner/bin/gmloadernext.aarch64
Extracted binary SHA256: 419B9C51BB75C6E10CDFB5F1ECD3767629AA8D9B664B4EC83B57160F4EC3A562
Role: Public prebuilt aarch64 runtime used by recent PortMaster GameMaker ports.

gmloadernext.armhf binary
Repository: https://github.com/JeodC/RHH-Ports
File: ports/released/gamemakerengine/digitaltamersreborn/digitaltamersreborn/gmloadernext.armhf
Extracted binary: pilasrunner/bin/gmloadernext.armhf
Extracted binary SHA256: 789BE95F52F0CE7BD67E6FB3A7DA304BB7832B2764E8A15C9D3F4106FF80A984
Role: Public prebuilt ARMv7/armhf gmloader-next binary used by a released PortMaster/RHH GameMaker port.

droidports
Repository: https://github.com/JohnnyonFlame/droidports
Role: historical gmloader implementation and ARM Linux compatibility reference.

PortMaster GameMaker Studio documentation
Repository: https://github.com/JanTrueno/PortMaster-Wiki
Document: docs/contribute/porting/engines/gamemaker-studio.md
Role: PortMaster packaging, gmloader-next architecture notes, GptokeyB conventions.
